words.example_sentence: Java Web uses Java technologies to build server-side web applications.
words.example_sentence_cn: Java Web 使用 Java 技术构建服务端 Web 应用。

words.example_sentence: Jakarta Servlet is the current servlet API used by Tomcat 11.
words.example_sentence_cn: Jakarta Servlet 是 Tomcat 11 使用的当前 Servlet API。

words.example_sentence: The Servlet API defines how Java web components handle requests and responses.
words.example_sentence_cn: Servlet API 定义 Java Web 组件如何处理请求和响应。
words.code_snippet: // Servlet API types live under jakarta.servlet

words.example_sentence: A servlet container manages servlet creation, routing, and lifecycle.
words.example_sentence_cn: Servlet 容器负责 Servlet 的创建、路由和生命周期。

words.example_sentence: Apache Tomcat implements the Jakarta Servlet specification.
words.example_sentence_cn: Apache Tomcat 实现了 Jakarta Servlet 规范。

words.example_sentence: HttpServlet provides methods for handling HTTP requests.
words.example_sentence_cn: HttpServlet 提供处理 HTTP 请求的方法。

words.example_sentence: GenericServlet is a protocol-independent base class for servlets.
words.example_sentence_cn: GenericServlet 是与协议无关的 Servlet 基类。

words.example_sentence: The servlet lifecycle includes initialization, request handling, and destruction.
words.example_sentence_cn: Servlet 生命周期包括初始化、请求处理和销毁。
words.code_snippet: // init -> service -> destroy is the servlet lifecycle

words.example_sentence: The container calls the init method once after creating a servlet.
words.example_sentence_cn: 容器创建 Servlet 后会调用一次 init 方法。

words.example_sentence: The service method dispatches each request to an HTTP-specific handler.
words.example_sentence_cn: service 方法把每个请求分派给对应的 HTTP 处理方法。
words.code_snippet: protected void service(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse resp) { }

words.example_sentence: The container calls the destroy method before removing a servlet.
words.example_sentence_cn: 容器移除 Servlet 前会调用 destroy 方法。

words.example_sentence: The doGet method handles HTTP GET requests.
words.example_sentence_cn: doGet 方法处理 HTTP GET 请求。
words.code_snippet: protected void doGet(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse resp) { }

words.example_sentence: The doPost method handles HTTP POST requests.
words.example_sentence_cn: doPost 方法处理 HTTP POST 请求。
words.code_snippet: protected void doPost(HttpServletRequest req, HttpServletResponse resp) { }

words.example_sentence: HttpServletRequest exposes parameters, headers, attributes, and session data.
words.example_sentence_cn: HttpServletRequest 提供参数、请求头、属性和会话数据。

words.example_sentence: HttpServletResponse controls the status, headers, and response body.
words.example_sentence_cn: HttpServletResponse 控制状态码、响应头和响应体。

words.example_sentence: A request parameter usually comes from a query string or form field.
words.example_sentence_cn: 请求参数通常来自查询字符串或表单字段。

words.example_sentence: A request attribute passes server-side data during one request.
words.example_sentence_cn: 请求属性用于在一次请求中传递服务端数据。

words.example_sentence: Request scope lasts until the current request finishes.
words.example_sentence_cn: 请求作用域持续到当前请求结束。

words.example_sentence: Session scope keeps data across multiple requests from one user.
words.example_sentence_cn: 会话作用域可在同一用户的多次请求之间保存数据。

words.example_sentence: Application scope is shared across the entire web application.
words.example_sentence_cn: 应用作用域由整个 Web 应用共享。

words.example_sentence: A URL mapping connects a request path to a servlet.
words.example_sentence_cn: URL 映射把请求路径连接到 Servlet。

words.example_sentence: The @WebServlet annotation declares a servlet and its URL patterns.
words.example_sentence_cn: @WebServlet 注解声明 Servlet 及其 URL 模式。

words.example_sentence: The web.xml file can configure servlets, filters, listeners, and mappings.
words.example_sentence_cn: web.xml 可以配置 Servlet、过滤器、监听器和映射。

words.example_sentence: A deployment descriptor provides XML configuration for a web application.
words.example_sentence_cn: 部署描述文件为 Web 应用提供 XML 配置。

words.example_sentence: RequestDispatcher can forward a request or include another resource.
words.example_sentence_cn: RequestDispatcher 可以转发请求或包含另一个资源。

words.example_sentence: A forward request transfers control on the server without a new browser request.
words.example_sentence_cn: 请求转发在服务端转交控制，不会让浏览器发起新请求。

words.example_sentence: sendRedirect tells the browser to make a new request to another URL.
words.example_sentence_cn: sendRedirect 通知浏览器向另一个 URL 发起新请求。

words.example_sentence: The Filter interface intercepts requests and responses around a target resource.
words.example_sentence_cn: Filter 接口在目标资源前后拦截请求和响应。

words.example_sentence: The filter chain passes control to the next filter or target servlet.
words.example_sentence_cn: 过滤器链把控制权交给下一个过滤器或目标 Servlet。

words.example_sentence: The @WebFilter annotation registers a servlet filter.
words.example_sentence_cn: @WebFilter 注解用于注册 Servlet 过滤器。

words.example_sentence: A listener reacts to application, session, or request lifecycle events.
words.example_sentence_cn: 监听器响应应用、会话或请求的生命周期事件。

words.example_sentence: The @WebListener annotation registers a servlet listener.
words.example_sentence_cn: @WebListener 注解用于注册 Servlet 监听器。

words.example_sentence: ServletContext stores information shared by the web application.
words.example_sentence_cn: ServletContext 保存整个 Web 应用共享的信息。

words.example_sentence: ServletConfig provides initialization parameters for one servlet.
words.example_sentence_cn: ServletConfig 提供单个 Servlet 的初始化参数。

words.example_sentence: HttpSession stores user-specific state across requests.
words.example_sentence_cn: HttpSession 在多次请求之间保存用户状态。

words.example_sentence: JSP renders server-side HTML and is common in traditional Java Web projects.
words.example_sentence_cn: JSP 用于服务端渲染 HTML，常见于传统 Java Web 项目。

words.example_sentence: Jakarta Expression Language reads model values in JSP pages.
words.example_sentence_cn: Jakarta 表达式语言用于在 JSP 页面读取模型值。

words.example_sentence: JSTL provides standard tags for conditions, loops, formatting, and URLs.
words.example_sentence_cn: JSTL 提供条件、循环、格式化和 URL 等标准标签。

words.example_sentence: A JSP directive configures page behavior at translation time.
words.example_sentence_cn: JSP 指令在页面转换阶段配置页面行为。

words.example_sentence: A JSP scriptlet embeds Java code but is discouraged in modern projects.
words.example_sentence_cn: JSP scriptlet 可以嵌入 Java 代码，但现代项目通常不推荐使用。

words.example_sentence: The MVC pattern separates request control, business data, and presentation.
words.example_sentence_cn: MVC 模式分离请求控制、业务数据和页面展示。
words.code_snippet: // Servlet = controller, model = data, JSP = view  // MVC pattern

words.example_sentence: A WAR file packages a Java web application for deployment to a servlet container.
words.example_sentence_cn: WAR 文件把 Java Web 应用打包后部署到 Servlet 容器。

words.example_sentence: The context path is the URL prefix assigned to a deployed web application.
words.example_sentence_cn: 上下文路径是部署后 Web 应用对应的 URL 前缀。

words.example_sentence: A MIME type tells the browser what kind of content a response contains.
words.example_sentence_cn: MIME 类型告诉浏览器响应中包含哪种内容。

words.example_sentence: Older tutorials use javax.servlet, while Tomcat 11 requires jakarta.servlet.
words.example_sentence_cn: 旧教程常用 javax.servlet，而 Tomcat 11 需要 jakarta.servlet。
